Author: OC-Helper Contributors
Name: OC-Helper
Punchline: Clean automation for Occult Crescent farming.
Description:
OC-Helper provides modular automation for Occult Crescent farming with a focus on code clarity and working configuration.

Features:
- Treasure hunting and tracking
- Combat automation with safety checks
- Performance metrics (gil/exp per hour)
- Configurable automation behaviors
- Over 500 lines of documentation

Unlike other farming plugins, OC-Helper prioritizes readable, maintainable code that you can understand and modify.
